name: spine-recall-quality-v1
description: Public eval set for the /api/cron/benchmarks harness. Mirrors tests/fixtures/recall-quality-data.ts exactly; if either is edited the other should track. The runner currently reads the TS module; this JSON exists so external replicators can audit the eval surface without a TS toolchain.

what is my preferred database setup?

falsePositiveQueries: how to fix a leaky kitchen tap
what is the chord progression for canon in D
how do I train for a marathon I have never seen

metrics.precisionAt5: Of the top 5 hits per query, how many carry the matching theme tag. Averaged across all queries.
metrics.recallAt10: Of the 40 ground-truth memories per theme, how many appear in the top-10 results across the theme's queries. Averaged across themes.
metrics.falsePositiveRate: Across the should-miss queries, fraction of top-5 result slots that came back tagged with any theme.
metrics.medianLatencyMs: Median wall-clock /api/recall round-trip across every query in the run.
